title: newsletter — HTTP middleware
description: Owns one middleware: `newsletter.token.verify` for signed subscribe / confirm / unsubscribe tokens. Consumes foundation + tenants stack otherwise.

middleware.name: newsletter.token.verify
middleware.description: Verifies signed HMAC token in the URL path against the subscription's stored token + expiry. Populates the request with the resolved NewsletterSubscription. 404 on mismatch to avoid enumeration.

consumed.notes: newsletter-public bucket rate-limits public subscribe endpoint to prevent audience-list attacks.
